title: The weighted two-cell P0 residual energy is nonnegative

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: If both cell masses are nonnegative, the weighted squared residual energy of the P0 projection is nonnegative.
informal.expected_conclusion: The weighted residual squared energy is nonnegative.

declarations.name: weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2
declarations.statement: def weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) : Real := m0 * (u0 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) ^ 2 + m1 * (u1 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) ^ 2

declarations.name: weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2_nonneg
declarations.statement: theorem weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2_nonneg (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) : 0 <= weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Translate nonnegativity of the weighted two-cell P0 residual energy into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2_nonneg (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) : 0 <= weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding residual energy and using nonnegative masses times nonnegative squares.
tasks.target: Unfold weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 and use mul_nonneg, sq_nonneg, and nlinarith.
